name: transcribe
description: Transcribe audio/video file or URL to text using MLX Whisper

source.description: URL (YouTube, Twitter, etc.) or local file path (.mp3, .mp4, .wav, .m4a, .flac, .ogg, .webm, .mkv, .avi, .mov, .aac, .wma, .opus, .ts)

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code (en, fr, es, de, etc.) or 'auto' for auto-detection

words.description: Enable word-level timestamps in SRT output

fields.description: Comma-separated list of response fields to include (text, language, srt_path, txt_path, json_path, wav_path)

dry-run.description: Validate input and show execution plan without transcribing

format.description: Output format (auto-detected: json when piped, table when TTY)

no-clean.description: Skip ffmpeg audio cleaning (silence removal, denoise, normalize)

no-download.description: Skip yt-dlp download (local files only, errors if input is URL)

json.description: Raw JSON payload with keys: input (source), language, model. Overrides CLI arguments.
